tools.name: Subfinder - Fast Passive Discovery
tools.description: Discovers subdomains using passive sources with high-speed enumeration and multiple data sources.
tools.command:
subfinder -d {domain} -all -recursive -t 50 -o {domain}_subfinder.txt
echo "[+] Subfinder: $(wc -l < {domain}_subfinder.txt) subdomains found"

tools.name: HTTPx - Live Host Verification
tools.description: Probes HTTP/HTTPS services on discovered subdomains with technology detection.
tools.command:
httpx -l {domain}_subfinder.txt -threads 50 -rate-limit 150 -timeout 10 -title -tech-detect -status-code -o {domain}_live_hosts.txt
echo "[+] HTTPx: $(wc -l < {domain}_live_hosts.txt) live hosts found"

tools.name: Amass - Intelligence Gathering
tools.description: Comprehensive OSINT-based subdomain enumeration with ASN and reverse whois lookups.
tools.command:
amass intel -d {domain} -whois -o {domain}_intel.txt
amass enum -passive -d {domain} -o {domain}_amass.txt
echo "[+] Amass: $(wc -l < {domain}_amass.txt) subdomains discovered"

tools.name: DNSGen - Subdomain Mutation
tools.description: Generates potential subdomains using permutation patterns and wordlist-based mutations.
tools.command:
cat {domain}_subfinder.txt | dnsgen - | head -20000 > {domain}_mutations.txt
subfinder -dL {domain}_mutations.txt -o {domain}_resolved_mutations.txt
echo "[+] DNSGen: $(wc -l < {domain}_resolved_mutations.txt) new subdomains via mutation"

tools.name: Assetfinder - Rapid Asset Discovery
tools.description: Lightweight subdomain discovery tool that focuses on speed and minimal configuration.
tools.command:
assetfinder --subs-only {domain} > {domain}_assetfinder.txt
echo "[+] Assetfinder: $(wc -l < {domain}_assetfinder.txt) assets discovered"

tools.name: Chaos - ProjectDiscovery Dataset
tools.description: Queries ProjectDiscovery's Chaos dataset for previously discovered subdomains.
tools.command:
chaos -d {domain} -key YOUR_CHAOS_API_KEY -o {domain}_chaos.txt
echo "[+] Chaos: $(wc -l < {domain}_chaos.txt) subdomains from dataset"

tools.name: GetAllUrls (GAU) - Archive Mining
tools.description: Fetches known URLs from Wayback Machine, Common Crawl, and AlienVault OTX for comprehensive historical coverage.
tools.command:
gau {domain} | head -15000 | sort -u > {domain}_gau_urls.txt
echo "[+] GAU: $(wc -l < {domain}_gau_urls.txt) unique URLs discovered"

tools.name: Wayback URLs - Internet Archive
tools.description: Specialized tool for extracting URLs from the Wayback Machine with date filtering capabilities.
tools.command:
waybackurls {domain} | head -10000 | sort -u > {domain}_wayback.txt
echo "[+] Wayback: $(wc -l < {domain}_wayback.txt) historical URLs found"

tools.name: Hakrawler - Live Web Crawling
tools.description: Fast web crawler that discovers URLs, forms, and JavaScript files by actively crawling live sites.
tools.command:
echo https://{domain} | hakrawler -depth 3 -plain -usewayback -insecure > {domain}_crawled.txt
echo "[+] Hakrawler: $(wc -l < {domain}_crawled.txt) URLs crawled"

tools.name: Katana - Next-Gen Web Crawler
tools.description: Modern web crawler with JavaScript rendering, form parsing, and scope control.
tools.command:
katana -u https://{domain} -d 5 -ps -pss waybackarchive,commoncrawl -f qurl -o {domain}_katana.txt
echo "[+] Katana: $(wc -l < {domain}_katana.txt) URLs discovered"

tools.name: GoSpider - Fast Web Spider
tools.description: High-performance web spider written in Go with support for multiple output formats.
tools.command:
gospider -s https://{domain} -d 2 -c 10 -t 20 --other-source --include-subs -o {domain}_spider
echo "[+] GoSpider: Crawling completed, check {domain}_spider/ directory"

tools.name: GauPlus - Enhanced Archive Mining
tools.description: Enhanced version of GAU with additional providers and filtering capabilities.
tools.command:
gauplus -subs {domain} -b png,jpg,gif,jpeg,swf,woff,svg,pdf -o {domain}_gauplus.txt
echo "[+] GauPlus: $(wc -l < {domain}_gauplus.txt) filtered URLs collected"

tools.name: Gobuster - High-Speed Directory Brute Force
tools.description: Ultra-fast directory and file brute-forcer with support for multiple wordlists and extensions.
tools.command:
gobuster dir -u https://{domain} -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-large-directories.txt -t 50 -x php,html,txt,js,json -q -o {domain}_gobuster.txt
echo "[+] Gobuster: $(wc -l < {domain}_gobuster.txt) paths discovered"

tools.name: Feroxbuster - Recursive Content Discovery
tools.description: Intelligent recursive content discovery with auto-filtering and wildcard detection.
tools.command:
feroxbuster -u https://{domain} -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-large-files.txt -t 30 -C 404,403 -x js,php,txt,json --auto-tune -o {domain}_ferox.txt
echo "[+] Feroxbuster: Recursive scan completed"

tools.name: FFUF - Fast Web Fuzzer
tools.description: Lightning-fast web fuzzer with advanced filtering and output options.
tools.command:
ffuf -u https://{domain}/FUZZ -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/big.txt -t 40 -rate 200 -fc 404,403 -o {domain}_ffuf.json
echo "[+] FFUF: Fuzzing completed, check JSON output"

tools.name: Dirsearch - Web Path Scanner
tools.description: Advanced web path scanner with smart detection and comprehensive wordlists.
tools.command:
dirsearch -u https://{domain} -e php,asp,aspx,jsp,html,js -t 30 --random-agent -o {domain}_dirsearch.txt
echo "[+] Dirsearch: $(grep -c "200" {domain}_dirsearch.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0) paths found"

tools.name: DIRB - Classic Directory Bruteforcer
tools.description: Traditional directory bruteforcer with built-in wordlists and authentication support.
tools.command:
dirb https://{domain} /usr/share/dirb/wordlists/big.txt -r -S -w -o {domain}_dirb.txt
echo "[+] DIRB: Classic directory scan completed"

tools.name: Wfuzz - Advanced Web Fuzzer
tools.description: Powerful web application fuzzer with plugins and multiple injection points.
tools.command:
wfuzz -c -z file,/usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt --hc 404,403 http://{domain}/FUZZ > {domain}_wfuzz.txt
echo "[+] Wfuzz: Advanced fuzzing completed"

tools.name: Nuclei Exposure Detection
tools.description: Scan for exposed sensitive files and configurations using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t exposures/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_exposures.txt
echo "Exposure scan results saved to {domain}_exposures.txt"

tools.name: TruffleHog Secret Scanning
tools.description: Search for secrets accidentally committed to repositories.
tools.command:
trufflehog git https://github.com/{domain} --only-verified > {domain}_secrets.txt
echo "Secret scan results saved to {domain}_secrets.txt"

tools.name: FFUF LFI Fuzzing
tools.description: Local File Inclusion testing using FFUF with LFI payloads.
tools.command:
ffuf -u 'https://{domain}/page?file=FUZZ' -w /opt/wordlists/lfi_payloads.txt -t 10 -rate 50 -mc 200 -o {domain}_lfi_results.json
echo "LFI fuzzing results saved to {domain}_lfi_results.json"

tools.name: Corsy CORS Scanner
tools.description: CORS misconfiguration scanner.
tools.command:
python3 /opt/tools/Corsy/corsy.py -u https://{domain} -t 20 -o {domain}_cors_results.txt
echo "CORS scan results saved to {domain}_cors_results.txt"

tools.name: WPScan Vulnerability Scanner
tools.description: WordPress Security Scanner that identifies vulnerabilities.
tools.command:
wpscan --url https://{domain} --enumerate p,t,u --plugins-detection aggressive --api-token YOUR_API_TOKEN -o {domain}_wpscan.json
echo "WPScan results saved to {domain}_wpscan.json"

tools.name: Nuclei WordPress Templates
tools.description: WordPress-specific vulnerability scanning using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t wordpress/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_wp_nuclei.txt
echo "WordPress Nuclei scan results saved to {domain}_wp_nuclei.txt"

tools.name: Nmap Basic Port Scan
tools.description: Basic port scan with service detection and common scripts.
tools.command:
nmap -sV -sC -T4 {domain} -oA {domain}_nmap_basic
echo "Nmap basic scan results saved to {domain}_nmap_basic.*"

tools.name: Nmap Full Port Scan
tools.description: Comprehensive scan of all 65535 ports.
tools.command:
nmap -p- -T4 {domain} -oA {domain}_nmap_full
echo "Nmap full port scan results saved to {domain}_nmap_full.*"

tools.name: Masscan Fast Port Scan
tools.description: Ultra-fast port scanner for large-scale scanning.
tools.command:
masscan -p1-65535 {domain} --rate=1000 -oX {domain}_masscan.xml
echo "Masscan results saved to {domain}_masscan.xml"

tools.name: Nmap NSE Scripts
tools.description: Service enumeration using Nmap NSE scripts.
tools.command:
nmap -sV --script=default,discovery,safe {domain} -oA {domain}_nse_enum
echo "NSE enumeration results saved to {domain}_nse_enum.*"

tools.name: Nuclei Service Detection
tools.description: Service-specific vulnerability scanning using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t technologies/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_service_detection.txt
echo "Service detection results saved to {domain}_service_detection.txt"

tools.name: Arjun Parameter Discovery
tools.description: HTTP parameter discovery suite.
tools.command:
arjun -u https://{domain} -w /opt/wordlists/parameters.txt -t 20 -o {domain}_parameters.txt
echo "Parameter discovery results saved to {domain}_parameters.txt"

tools.name: FFUF Parameter Fuzzing
tools.description: Parameter fuzzing using FFUF with common parameter wordlists.
tools.command:
ffuf -u 'https://{domain}/?FUZZ=test' -w /opt/wordlists/parameters.txt -t 20 -rate 100 -mc 200 -o {domain}_param_fuzz.json
echo "Parameter fuzzing results saved to {domain}_param_fuzz.json"

tools.name: LinkFinder
tools.description: Python script to discover endpoints in JavaScript files.
tools.command:
python3 /opt/tools/LinkFinder/linkfinder.py -i https://{domain} -d -o {domain}_js_endpoints.html
echo "JavaScript endpoints saved to {domain}_js_endpoints.html"

tools.name: GetJS
tools.description: Tool to extract all JavaScript files from a domain.
tools.command:
getjs --url https://{domain} --output {domain}_js_files.txt
echo "JavaScript files saved to {domain}_js_files.txt"

tools.name: Nuclei API Templates
tools.description: API-specific vulnerability scanning using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t http/misconfiguration/,http/vulnerabilities/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_api_scan.txt
echo "API scan results saved to {domain}_api_scan.txt"

tools.name: FFUF API Endpoint Discovery
tools.description: API endpoint discovery using common API patterns.
tools.command:
ffuf -u 'https://{domain}/api/FUZZ' -w /opt/wordlists/api_endpoints.txt -t 20 -rate 100 -mc 200,201,204 -o {domain}_api_endpoints.json
echo "API endpoint discovery results saved to {domain}_api_endpoints.json"

tools.name: MobSF API Scan
tools.description: Mobile Security Framework API scanning.
tools.command:
# Note: Requires MobSF setup and APK/IPA file
echo "Mobile app security testing requires MobSF framework setup"
echo "Upload your APK/IPA file to MobSF at http://localhost:8000"

tools.name: S3 Bucket Scanner
tools.description: Scan for misconfigured S3 buckets related to the domain.
tools.command:
python3 /opt/tools/S3Scanner/s3scanner.py -d {domain} -o {domain}_s3_buckets.txt
echo "S3 bucket scan results saved to {domain}_s3_buckets.txt"

tools.name: Nuclei Cloud Templates
tools.description: Cloud-specific misconfigurations using Nuclei.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t cloud/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_cloud_scan.txt
echo "Cloud security scan results saved to {domain}_cloud_scan.txt"

tools.name: Nuclei Full Scan
tools.description: Comprehensive vulnerability scan using all Nuclei templates.
tools.command:
nuclei -u https://{domain} -t cves/,vulnerabilities/,misconfiguration/ -rate-limit 50 -o {domain}_vuln_scan.txt
echo "Vulnerability scan results saved to {domain}_vuln_scan.txt"

tools.name: Nikto Web Scanner
tools.description: Web server scanner for dangerous files and vulnerabilities.
tools.command:
nikto -h https://{domain} -Format txt -output {domain}_nikto.txt
echo "Nikto scan results saved to {domain}_nikto.txt"

tools.name: SQLMap Crawl & Test
tools.description: Crawl the site and test for SQL injection vulnerabilities.
tools.command:
sqlmap -u https://{domain} --crawl=2 --batch --random-agent --level=2 --risk=2 -o {domain}_sqlmap
echo "SQLMap results saved to {domain}_sqlmap/"

tools.name: theHarvester - Email & Domain Intelligence
tools.description: Comprehensive OSINT tool for gathering emails, names, subdomains, IPs, and URLs from public sources.
tools.command:
theHarvester -d {domain} -l 500 -b google,bing,yahoo,duckduckgo,linkedin,twitter -f {domain}_harvest
echo "[+] theHarvester: Intelligence gathering completed"

tools.name: Sherlock - Social Media Username Search
tools.description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks.
tools.command:
sherlock {domain} --output {domain}_sherlock_results.txt --csv
echo "[+] Sherlock: Social media account search completed"

tools.name: Shodan - Internet Scanner Search
tools.description: Search engine for Internet-connected devices, perfect for discovering exposed services.
tools.command:
shodan search hostname:{domain} --fields ip_str,port,org,os,product --separator "," > {domain}_shodan.csv
echo "[+] Shodan: Internet device search completed"

tools.name: SpiderFoot - Automated OSINT
tools.description: Automated OSINT collection with 200+ modules for footprinting and intelligence gathering.
tools.command:
python3 /opt/spiderfoot/sf.py -s {domain} -t DOMAIN_NAME -q -o csv:{domain}_spiderfoot.csv
echo "[+] SpiderFoot: Automated OSINT scan initiated"

tools.name: Burp Suite - Web Security Testing Platform
tools.description: Industry-standard web application security testing platform with proxy, scanner, and intruder.
tools.command:
echo "Burp Suite requires GUI - Launch via: burpsuite"
echo "Configure proxy: 127.0.0.1:8080"
echo "[+] Burp Suite: Configure browser proxy and start testing"

tools.name: OWASP ZAP - Web Application Security Scanner
tools.description: Free and open-source web application security scanner with automated and manual testing capabilities.
tools.command:
zap-baseline.py -t https://{domain} -J {domain}_zap_baseline.json
echo "[+] ZAP: Baseline security scan completed"

tools.name: WhatWeb - Web Technology Identifier
tools.description: Recognizes web technologies including CMS, blogging platforms, analytics packages, and more.
tools.command:
whatweb -a 3 --color=never --log-brief={domain}_whatweb.txt https://{domain}
echo "[+] WhatWeb: Technology fingerprinting completed"

tools.name: WAFW00F - Web Application Firewall Detection
tools.description: Identifies and fingerprints Web Application Firewall (WAF) products protecting a website.
tools.command:
wafw00f https://{domain} -a -o {domain}_waf_detection.txt
echo "[+] WAFW00F: WAF detection completed"
